creator: fiercex@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #3)
I've tried this, I uninstall ghostscript9 and it automatically uninstalls the tex related packages, I install the tex related packages and it automatically installs ghostscript9. whereas I install ghostscript10 directly and it starts uninstalling ghostscript9 and the related tex packages. It seems like texlive-base is dependent on ghostscript9. Is there a better way to fix this until 272131 is resolved?

===============
[$] pkg remove ghostscript9-agpl-base-9.56.1_12
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)

	tex-luatex: 1.16.0_1
	tex-xetex: 0.99993_4
	tex-xmltex: 1.9_4
	texlive-base: 20230313_3
	texlive-full: 20230313
	texlive-texmf: 20230313

Number of packages to be removed: 11

The operation will free 3 GiB.

Proceed with deinstalling packages? [y/N]
===============

===============
